title: Why credibility matters (and why over-collateralization shouldn't be the only answer)
description: Traditional DeFi often reaches for heavy collateral to feel safe. That works for some instruments, but it makes everyday finance clunky and exclusionary. Credibility-based DeFi says: let peers earn limits, speed, and price by behaving well over time, and let ZK proofs protect privacy while doing so.

frontMatter.title: Why credibility matters (and why over-collateralization shouldn't be the only answer)
